description: Build ai.toolboxonline.club — AI-powered online tools with freemium credit-based billing. Next.js frontend + FastAPI backend + Replicate API + Stripe.

userStories.title: Initialize Next.js frontend project on Vercel
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a fresh Next.js project configured with Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, and the same design system as the main site (toolboxonline.club), deployed to Vercel with ai.toolboxonline.club domain.
acceptanceCriteria: Next.js project created with TypeScript + Tailwind + App Router
Design tokens match main site (colors, fonts, spacing)

userStories.title: Set up FastAPI backend service
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a FastAPI backend deployed on Render/Railway with PostgreSQL database, S3/R2 storage config, and Replicate API integration.
acceptanceCriteria: Replicate API client integrated and tested
S3/R2 storage client integrated for file uploads

userStories.title: User authentication system
userStories.description: As a user, I need to sign up, log in, and manage my account so I can use AI tools and track my credits.
acceptanceCriteria: User profile page showing credit balance
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Credit system + Stripe payment
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a credit system with Stripe integration so users can purchase credits and spend them on AI tools.
acceptanceCriteria: Credit balance stored in user table
Stripe webhook handler for payment confirmation
Verify Stripe test mode payment flow

userStories.title: Build AI Avatar Generator tool page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to upload a photo and get cartoon/anime style avatars so I can use them for profiles.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build Background Remover tool page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to remove the background from my photos with one click.
acceptanceCriteria: One-click background removal via Replicate rembg
Options: transparent, white, custom color background
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build Watermark Remover tool page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to remove watermarks and unwanted text from my photos.
acceptanceCriteria: Brush tool to paint over watermark area
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build Photo Restorer tool page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to restore and colorize old, blurry, or damaged photos.
acceptanceCriteria: Options: restore only, colorize only, restore + colorize
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build PDF to Word Converter tool page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to convert PDF documents to editable Word files.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend converts via pdf2docx (no external API)
Shows page count and credit cost (1pt for ≤10 pages, 2pt for >10)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Homepage + tool listing + main site cross-link
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want a landing page that showcases all available AI tools, with clear pricing and a link back to the main toolboxonline.club site.
acceptanceCriteria: Homepage with hero section, tool grid, pricing section, FAQ
Each tool card shows icon, name, description, credit cost
Footer with link to main site toolboxonline.club
SEO meta tags + JSON-LD structured data
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
